notes:
I tried this with regular Proton 7.0.4 and GE-Proton7-48, both with the `Game.exe` from Steam and the `Game.exe` produced by the 1.1 update patch.

In all cases, the game takes several minutes to load, spawns 5 `Game.exe` processes (of which 2 disappear after a while), but then only displays an empty black window.
